---
title: "Life Science Symposium 2026: Data Visualization"
categories:
image: "lss2026.png"
href: "https://grcetmpk.github.io/lss-2026-dataviz/"
---

</br>

![](lss2026.png){fig-align="center"}

An invited in-person workshop for students in life sciences or related disciplines.

The workshop materials are available here: \[LINK\]
